title: Fruit Into Baskets
description: Max fruits in two baskets.

templates.python: def solve(fruits): left=0; count={}; max_len=0; for right,x in enumerate(fruits): count[x]=count.get(x,0)+1; while len(count)>2: count[fruits[left]]-=1; if count[fruits[left]]==0: del count[fruits[left]]; left+=1; max_len=max(max_len, right-left+1); return max_len
templates.javascript: function solve(fruits){let left=0, count={}, maxLen=0; for(let right=0;right<fruits.length;right++){count[fruits[right]]=(count[fruits[right]]||0)+1; while(Object.keys(count).length>2){count[fruits[left]]--; if(count[fruits[left]]===0)delete count[fruits[left]]; left++;} maxLen=Math.max(maxLen, right-left+1);} return maxLen;}
templates.cpp: int solve(vector<int>& fruits){int left=0,maxLen=0; unordered_map<int,int> count; for(int right=0;right<fruits.size();right++){count[fruits[right]]++; while(count.size()>2){count[fruits[left]]--; if(count[fruits[left]]==0)count.erase(fruits[left]); left++;} maxLen=max(maxLen, right-left+1);} return maxLen;}

title: Range Sum Query 2D
description: Compute sum of submatrix given prefix matrix.

templates.python: class NumMatrix: def __init__(self,matrix): if not matrix: return; m,n=len(matrix),len(matrix[0]); self.pref=[[0]*(n+1) for _ in range(m+1)]; for i in range(m): for j in range(n): self.pref[i+1][j+1]=self.pref[i][j+1]+self.pref[i+1][j]-self.pref[i][j]+matrix[i][j]; def sumRegion(self,row1,col1,row2,col2): return self.pref[row2+1][col2+1]-self.pref[row1][col2+1]-self.pref[row2+1][col1]+self.pref[row1][col1]
templates.javascript: class NumMatrix{constructor(matrix){if(!matrix.length)return; let m=matrix.length,n=matrix[0].length; this.pref=Array.from({length:m+1},()=>Array(n+1).fill(0)); for(let i=0;i<m;i++)for(let j=0;j<n;j++)this.pref[i+1][j+1]=this.pref[i][j+1]+this.pref[i+1][j]-this.pref[i][j]+matrix[i][j];} sumRegion(row1,col1,row2,col2){return this.pref[row2+1][col2+1]-this.pref[row1][col2+1]-this.pref[row2+1][col1]+this.pref[row1][col1];}}
templates.cpp: class NumMatrix{vector<vector<int>> pref; public: NumMatrix(vector<vector<int>>& matrix){if(matrix.empty())return; int m=matrix.size(), n=matrix[0].size(); pref.assign(m+1, vector<int>(n+1,0)); for(int i=0;i<m;i++) for(int j=0;j<n;j++) pref[i+1][j+1]=pref[i][j+1]+pref[i+1][j]-pref[i][j]+matrix[i][j];} int sumRegion(int row1,int col1,int row2,int col2){return pref[row2+1][col2+1]-pref[row1][col2+1]-pref[row2+1][col1]+pref[row1][col1];}};

title: Search in 2D Matrix
description: Search target in sorted 2D matrix.

templates.python: def solve(matrix,target): if not matrix: return False; m,n=len(matrix),len(matrix[0]); l=0; r=m*n-1; while l<=r: mid=(l+r)//2; val=matrix[mid//n][mid%n]; if val==target: return True; elif val<target: l=mid+1; else: r=mid-1; return False
templates.javascript: function solve(matrix,target){if(!matrix.length)return false; let m=matrix.length,n=matrix[0].length; let l=0,r=m*n-1; while(l<=r){let mid=Math.floor((l+r)/2); let val=matrix[Math.floor(mid/n)][mid%n]; if(val===target)return true; else if(val<target)l=mid+1; else r=mid-1;} return false;}
templates.cpp: bool solve(vector<vector<int>>& matrix,int target){if(matrix.empty())return false; int m=matrix.size(), n=matrix[0].size(); int l=0,r=m*n-1; while(l<=r){int mid=l+(r-l)/2; int val=matrix[mid/n][mid%n]; if(val==target)return true; else if(val<target)l=mid+1; else r=mid-1;} return false;}

title: Invert Binary Tree
description: Invert binary tree (mirror).

templates.python: def solve(root): if not root: return None; left=solve(root.left); right=solve(root.right); root.left=right; root.right=left; return root

title: Delete Node in BST
description: Delete a node in BST.

templates.python: def solve(root,key): if not root: return None; if key<root.val: root.left=solve(root.left,key); elif key>root.val: root.right=solve(root.right,key); else: if not root.left: return root.right; elif not root.right: return root.left; node=root.right; while node.left: node=node.left; root.val=node.val; root.right=solve(root.right,node.val); return root
templates.javascript: function solve(root,key){if(!root)return null; if(key<root.val)root.left=solve(root.left,key); else if(key>root.val)root.right=solve(root.right,key); else{if(!root.left)return root.right; if(!root.right)return root.left; let node=root.right; while(node.left)node=node.left; root.val=node.val; root.right=solve(root.right,node.val);} return root;}
templates.cpp: TreeNode* solve(TreeNode* root,int key){if(!root)return nullptr; if(key<root->val)root->left=solve(root->left,key); else if(key>root->val)root->right=solve(root->right,key); else{if(!root->left)return root->right; if(!root->right)return root->left; TreeNode* node=root->right; while(node->left)node=node->left; root->val=node->val; root->right=solve(root->right,node->val);} return root;}

title: Reorganize String
description: Rearrange string so no adjacent chars are same.

templates.javascript: function solve(s){let count={}; for(let ch of s)count[ch]=(count[ch]||0)+1; let maxHeap=[]; for(let [ch,c] of Object.entries(count))maxHeap.push([-c,ch]); maxHeap.sort((a,b)=>a[0]-b[0]); let res=[], prev=null; while(maxHeap.length){let [c,ch]=maxHeap.shift(); res.push(ch); if(prev)maxHeap.push(prev); maxHeap.sort((a,b)=>a[0]-b[0]); prev=(c+1<0)?[c+1,ch]:null;} if(prev)return ''; return res.join('');}
templates.cpp: string solve(string s){unordered_map<char,int> count; for(char c:s)count[c]++; priority_queue<pair<int,char>> pq; for(auto& p:count)pq.push({p.second,p.first}); string res; pair<int,char> prev={0,' '}; while(!pq.empty()){auto [c,ch]=pq.top(); pq.pop(); res+=ch; if(prev.first>0)pq.push(prev); prev={c-1,ch};} if(res.size()!=s.size())return ""; return res;}

title: Longest Word in Dictionary
description: Find longest word that can be built from other words.

templates.python: def solve(words): words.sort(); root={}; for w in words: node=root; for ch in w: if ch not in node: node[ch]={}; node=node[ch]; node['#']=True; res=''; def dfs(node,path): nonlocal res; if '#' in node and len(path)>len(res): res=path; for ch in node: if ch!='#' and '#' in node[ch]: dfs(node[ch],path+ch); for ch in root: if '#' in root[ch]: dfs(root[ch],ch); return res
templates.javascript: function solve(words){words.sort(); let root={}; for(let w of words){let node=root; for(let ch of w){if(!node[ch])node[ch]={}; node=node[ch];} node.end=true;} let res=''; function dfs(node,path){if(node.end && path.length>res.length)res=path; for(let ch in node){if(ch!=='end' && node[ch].end)dfs(node[ch], path+ch);}} for(let ch in root){if(root[ch].end)dfs(root[ch], ch);} return res;}

title: Redundant Connection
description: Find edge that creates cycle in undirected graph.

templates.python:
class DSU: def __init__(self,n): self.par=list(range(n+1)); def find(self,x): while self.par[x]!=x: self.par[x]=self.par[self.par[x]]; x=self.par[x]; return x; def union(self,a,b): a=self.find(a); b=self.find(b); if a==b: return False; self.par[b]=a; return True
def solve(edges): dsu=DSU(len(edges)); for u,v in edges: if not dsu.union(u,v): return [u,v]

class DSU{constructor(n){this.par=Array.from({length:n+1},(_,i)=>i);} find(x){while(this.par[x]!==x){this.par[x]=this.par[this.par[x]]; x=this.par[x];} return x;} union(a,b){a=this.find(a); b=this.find(b); if(a===b)return false; this.par[b]=a; return true;}}
function solve(edges){let dsu=new DSU(edges.length); for(let [u,v] of edges){if(!dsu.union(u,v))return [u,v];} return [];}

class DSU{vector<int> par; public: DSU(int n){par.resize(n+1); iota(par.begin(),par.end(),0);} int find(int x){return par[x]==x?x:par[x]=find(par[x]);} bool unite(int a,int b){a=find(a);b=find(b); if(a==b)return false; par[b]=a; return true;}};
vector<int> solve(vector<pair<int,int>>& edges){DSU dsu(edges.size()); for(auto [u,v]:edges){if(!dsu.unite(u,v))return {u,v};} return {};}

title: Aho-Corasick (partial)
description: Build automaton for multiple patterns.

templates.python: class AhoCorasick: def __init__(self): self.trie=[{}]; self.fail=[0]; self.output=[[]]; def add(self,word): node=0; for ch in word: if ch not in self.trie[node]: self.trie[node][ch]=len(self.trie); self.trie.append({}); self.fail.append(0); self.output.append([]); node=self.trie[node][ch]; self.output[node].append(word); def build(self): from collections import deque; q=deque(); for ch in self.trie[0]: child=self.trie[0][ch]; self.fail[child]=0; q.append(child); while q: r=q.popleft(); for ch,child in self.trie[r].items(): q.append(child); f=self.fail[r]; while f and ch not in self.trie[f]: f=self.fail[f]; self.fail[child]=self.trie[f][ch] if ch in self.trie[f] else 0; self.output[child]+=self.output[self.fail[child]]; def search(self,text): node=0; res=[]; for i,ch in enumerate(text): while node and ch not in self.trie[node]: node=self.fail[node]; node=self.trie[node][ch] if ch in self.trie[node] else 0; if self.output[node]: res.extend(self.output[node]); return res

// Aho-Corasick implementation is large; provide stub.
class AhoCorasick{vector<unordered_map<char,int>> trie; vector<int> fail; vector<vector<string>> out; public: AhoCorasick(){trie.push_back({}); fail.push_back(0); out.push_back({});} void add(string s){int node=0; for(char c:s){if(!trie[node].count(c)){trie[node][c]=trie.size(); trie.push_back({}); fail.push_back(0); out.push_back({});} node=trie[node][c];} out[node].push_back(s);} void build(){queue<int> q; for(auto& p:trie[0]){int child=p.second; fail[child]=0; q.push(child);} while(!q.empty()){int r=q.front();q.pop(); for(auto& p:trie[r]){int child=p.second; char c=p.first; q.push(child); int f=fail[r]; while(f && !trie[f].count(c))f=fail[f]; fail[child]=trie[f].count(c)?trie[f][c]:0; out[child].insert(out[child].end(), out[fail[child]].begin(), out[fail[child]].end());}}} vector<string> search(string text){int node=0; vector<string> res; for(char c:text){while(node && !trie[node].count(c))node=fail[node]; node=trie[node].count(c)?trie[node][c]:0; if(!out[node].empty())res.insert(res.end(), out[node].begin(), out[node].end());} return res;}};

templates.python: def solve(board): def valid(r,c,ch): for i in range(9): if board[r][i]==ch: return False; if board[i][c]==ch: return False; br, bc = r//3*3, c//3*3; for i in range(3): for j in range(3): if board[br+i][bc+j]==ch: return False; return True; def backtrack(): for i in range(9): for j in range(9): if board[i][j]=='.': for ch in '123456789': if valid(i,j,ch): board[i][j]=ch; if backtrack(): return True; board[i][j]='.'; return False; return True; backtrack(); return board

title: LRU Cache (again but different)
description: Design LRU with get and put.

templates.python: class LRUCache: def __init__(self, capacity): self.cap=capacity; self.cache={}; self.order=[]; def get(self,key): if key not in self.cache: return -1; self.order.remove(key); self.order.append(key); return self.cache[key]; def put(self,key,value): if key in self.cache: self.order.remove(key); self.cache[key]=value; self.order.append(key); else: if len(self.cache)>=self.cap: lru=self.order.pop(0); del self.cache[lru]; self.cache[key]=value; self.order.append(key)
templates.javascript: class LRUCache{constructor(capacity){this.cap=capacity; this.cache=new Map();} get(key){if(!this.cache.has(key))return -1; let val=this.cache.get(key); this.cache.delete(key); this.cache.set(key,val); return val;} put(key,value){if(this.cache.has(key))this.cache.delete(key); this.cache.set(key,value); if(this.cache.size>this.cap){this.cache.delete(this.cache.keys().next().value);}}}
templates.cpp: class LRUCache{list<int> order; unordered_map<int, pair<int, list<int>::iterator>> cache; int cap; public: LRUCache(int capacity){cap=capacity;} int get(int key){if(!cache.count(key))return -1; order.erase(cache[key].second); order.push_front(key); cache[key].second=order.begin(); return cache[key].first;} void put(int key,int value){if(cache.count(key)){order.erase(cache[key].second);} order.push_front(key); cache[key]={value, order.begin()}; if(cache.size()>cap){int last=order.back(); order.pop_back(); cache.erase(last);}}};

def solve(arr): if len(arr)<=1: return arr; pivot=random.choice(arr); left=[x for x in arr if x<pivot]; middle=[x for x in arr if x==pivot]; right=[x for x in arr if x>pivot]; return solve(left)+middle+solve(right)

templates.python: def solve(piles): n=len(piles); suffix=[0]*(n+1); for i in range(n-1,-1,-1): suffix[i]=suffix[i+1]+piles[i]; from functools import lru_cache; @lru_cache(None) def dp(i,M): if i>=n: return 0; if i+2*M >= n: return suffix[i]; best=0; for x in range(1,2*M+1): best=max(best, suffix[i]-dp(i+x, max(M,x))); return best; return dp(0,1)

title: Permutations Recursive
description: Generate permutations recursively.

templates.python: def solve(nums): res=[]; def dfs(path,used): if len(path)==len(nums): res.append(path[:]); return; for i,x in enumerate(nums): if not used[i]: used[i]=True; path.append(x); dfs(path,used); path.pop(); used[i]=False; dfs([],[False]*len(nums)); return res
templates.javascript: function solve(nums){let res=[]; function dfs(path, used){if(path.length===nums.length){res.push([...path]); return;} for(let i=0;i<nums.length;i++){if(!used[i]){used[i]=true; path.push(nums[i]); dfs(path, used); path.pop(); used[i]=false;}}} dfs([], Array(nums.length).fill(false)); return res;}
templates.cpp: vector<vector<int>> solve(vector<int>& nums){vector<vector<int>> res; vector<int> path; vector<bool> used(nums.size(),false); function<void()> dfs=[&](){if(path.size()==nums.size()){res.push_back(path); return;} for(int i=0;i<nums.size();i++){if(!used[i]){used[i]=true; path.push_back(nums[i]); dfs(); path.pop_back(); used[i]=false;}}}; dfs(); return res;}

title: Heap Sort
description: Sort array using heap sort.

templates.python: def solve(arr): import heapq; heapq.heapify(arr); return [heapq.heappop(arr) for _ in range(len(arr))]
templates.javascript: function solve(arr){let heap=[]; for(let x of arr)heap.push(x); heap.sort((a,b)=>a-b); return heap;}
templates.cpp: vector<int> solve(vector<int>& arr){priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> pq; for(int x:arr)pq.push(x); vector<int> res; while(!pq.empty()){res.push_back(pq.top()); pq.pop();} return res;}

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array II
description: Search in rotated sorted with duplicates.

templates.python: def solve(nums,target): l=0; r=len(nums)-1; while l<=r: mid=(l+r)//2; if nums[mid]==target: return True; if nums[l]==nums[mid] and nums[mid]==nums[r]: l+=1; r-=1; elif nums[l]<=nums[mid]: if nums[l]<=target<nums[mid]: r=mid-1; else: l=mid+1; else: if nums[mid]<target<=nums[r]: l=mid+1; else: r=mid-1; return False
templates.javascript: function solve(nums,target){let l=0,r=nums.length-1; while(l<=r){let mid=Math.floor((l+r)/2); if(nums[mid]===target)return true; if(nums[l]===nums[mid] && nums[mid]===nums[r]){l++; r--;} else if(nums[l]<=nums[mid]){if(nums[l]<=target && target<nums[mid])r=mid-1; else l=mid+1;} else{if(nums[mid]<target && target<=nums[r])l=mid+1; else r=mid-1;}} return false;}
templates.cpp: bool solve(vector<int>& nums,int target){int l=0,r=nums.size()-1; while(l<=r){int mid=l+(r-l)/2; if(nums[mid]==target)return true; if(nums[l]==nums[mid] && nums[mid]==nums[r]){l++; r--;} else if(nums[l]<=nums[mid]){if(nums[l]<=target && target<nums[mid])r=mid-1; else l=mid+1;} else{if(nums[mid]<target && target<=nums[r])l=mid+1; else r=mid-1;}} return false;}

title: Swap Nodes in Pairs
description: Swap every two adjacent nodes.

templates.python: def solve(head): dummy=ListNode(0); dummy.next=head; prev=dummy; while prev.next and prev.next.next: first=prev.next; second=prev.next.next; first.next=second.next; second.next=first; prev.next=second; prev=first; return dummy.next
templates.javascript: function solve(head){let dummy=new ListNode(0); dummy.next=head; let prev=dummy; while(prev.next && prev.next.next){let first=prev.next; let second=prev.next.next; first.next=second.next; second.next=first; prev.next=second; prev=first;} return dummy.next;}
templates.cpp: ListNode* solve(ListNode* head){ListNode dummy(0); dummy.next=head; ListNode* prev=&dummy; while(prev->next && prev->next->next){ListNode* first=prev->next; ListNode* second=prev->next->next; first->next=second->next; second->next=first; prev->next=second; prev=first;} return dummy.next;}

title: Decode String
description: Decode string with k[encoded].

templates.python: def solve(s): stack=[]; curr_num=0; curr_str=''; for ch in s: if ch.isdigit(): curr_num=curr_num*10+int(ch); elif ch=='[': stack.append((curr_str,curr_num)); curr_str=''; curr_num=0; elif ch==']': prev_str,num=stack.pop(); curr_str=prev_str+num*curr_str; else: curr_str+=ch; return curr_str
templates.javascript: function solve(s){let stack=[]; let currNum=0, currStr=''; for(let ch of s){if(!isNaN(ch))currNum=currNum*10+Number(ch); else if(ch==='['){stack.push([currStr,currNum]); currStr=''; currNum=0;} else if(ch===']'){let [prevStr,num]=stack.pop(); currStr=prevStr+num*currStr;} else currStr+=ch;} return currStr;}
templates.cpp: string solve(string s){stack<pair<string,int>> st; int num=0; string cur; for(char c:s){if(isdigit(c))num=num*10+c-'0'; else if(c=='['){st.push({cur,num}); cur=""; num=0;} else if(c==']'){auto [prev,n]=st.top(); st.pop(); string tmp; for(int i=0;i<n;i++)tmp+=cur; cur=prev+tmp;} else cur+=c;} return cur;}

title: Moving Average from Data Stream
description: Compute moving average with fixed window.

templates.python: class MovingAverage: def __init__(self,size): self.size=size; self.queue=deque(); self.sum=0; def next(self,val): self.queue.append(val); self.sum+=val; if len(self.queue)>self.size: self.sum-=self.queue.popleft(); return self.sum/len(self.queue)
templates.javascript: class MovingAverage{constructor(size){this.size=size; this.queue=[]; this.sum=0;} next(val){this.queue.push(val); this.sum+=val; if(this.queue.length>this.size){this.sum-=this.queue.shift();} return this.sum/this.queue.length;}}
templates.cpp: class MovingAverage{int size; queue<int> q; double sum=0; public: MovingAverage(int s){size=s;} double next(int val){q.push(val); sum+=val; if(q.size()>size){sum-=q.front(); q.pop();} return sum/q.size();}};

title: Jewels and Stones
description: Count jewels in stones.

templates.python: def solve(J,S): s=set(J); return sum(1 for ch in S if ch in s)
templates.javascript: function solve(J,S){let set=new Set(J); return S.split('').filter(ch=>set.has(ch)).length;}

title: Backspace String Compare
description: Compare two strings with backspaces.

templates.python: def solve(S,T): def build(s): stack=[]; for ch in s: if ch!='#': stack.append(ch); elif stack: stack.pop(); return ''.join(stack); return build(S)==build(T)
templates.javascript: function solve(S,T){function build(s){let st=[]; for(let ch of s){if(ch!=='#')st.push(ch); else if(st.length)st.pop();} return st.join('');} return build(S)===build(T);}
templates.cpp: bool solve(string S,string T){auto build=[&](string s){vector<char> st; for(char c:s){if(c!='#')st.push_back(c); else if(!st.empty())st.pop_back();} return string(st.begin(),st.end());}; return build(S)==build(T);}

title: Max Consecutive Ones III
description: Max consecutive ones with at most k flips.

templates.python: def solve(nums,k): left=0; max_len=0; zeros=0; for right,x in enumerate(nums): if x==0: zeros+=1; while zeros>k: if nums[left]==0: zeros-=1; left+=1; max_len=max(max_len, right-left+1); return max_len
templates.javascript: function solve(nums,k){let left=0, zeros=0, maxLen=0; for(let right=0;right<nums.length;right++){if(nums[right]===0)zeros++; while(zeros>k){if(nums[left]===0)zeros--; left++;} maxLen=Math.max(maxLen, right-left+1);} return maxLen;}
templates.cpp: int solve(vector<int>& nums,int k){int left=0, zeros=0, maxLen=0; for(int right=0;right<nums.size();right++){if(nums[right]==0)zeros++; while(zeros>k){if(nums[left]==0)zeros--; left++;} maxLen=max(maxLen, right-left+1);} return maxLen;}

title: Number of Subarrays with Sum 0
description: Count subarrays with sum 0.

templates.python: def solve(arr): from collections import defaultdict; pref=0; count=0; seen=defaultdict(int); seen[0]=1; for x in arr: pref+=x; count+=seen.get(pref,0); seen[pref]+=1; return count
templates.javascript: function solve(arr){let pref=0,count=0,seen={0:1}; for(let x of arr){pref+=x; count+=(seen[pref]||0); seen[pref]=(seen[pref]||0)+1;} return count;}
templates.cpp: int solve(vector<int>& arr){unordered_map<int,int> seen; int pref=0,count=0; seen[0]=1; for(int x:arr){pref+=x; count+=seen[pref]; seen[pref]++;} return count;}

title: Time Based Key-Value Store
description: Store key-value with timestamps, get by timestamp.

templates.python: class TimeMap: def __init__(self): self.map={}; def set(self,key,value,timestamp): if key not in self.map: self.map[key]=[]; self.map[key].append((timestamp,value)); def get(self,key,timestamp): if key not in self.map: return ""; arr=self.map[key]; l=0; r=len(arr)-1; res=""; while l<=r: mid=(l+r)//2; if arr[mid][0]<=timestamp: res=arr[mid][1]; l=mid+1; else: r=mid-1; return res
templates.javascript: class TimeMap{constructor(){this.map={};} set(key,value,timestamp){if(!this.map[key])this.map[key]=[]; this.map[key].push([timestamp,value]);} get(key,timestamp){let arr=this.map[key]; if(!arr)return ""; let l=0,r=arr.length-1,res=""; while(l<=r){let mid=Math.floor((l+r)/2); if(arr[mid][0]<=timestamp){res=arr[mid][1]; l=mid+1;} else r=mid-1;} return res;}}
templates.cpp: class TimeMap{unordered_map<string, vector<pair<int,string>>> mp; public: void set(string key,string value,int timestamp){mp[key].push_back({timestamp,value});} string get(string key,int timestamp){if(!mp.count(key))return ""; auto& vec=mp[key]; int l=0,r=vec.size()-1; string res; while(l<=r){int mid=l+(r-l)/2; if(vec[mid].first<=timestamp){res=vec[mid].second; l=mid+1;} else r=mid-1;} return res;}};

title: Diameter of Binary Tree
description: Find diameter (longest path) in binary tree.

templates.python: def solve(root): diam=0; def height(node): nonlocal diam; if not node: return 0; l=height(node.left); r=height(node.right); diam=max(diam,l+r); return 1+max(l,r); height(root); return diam
templates.javascript: function solve(root){let diam=0; function height(node){if(!node)return 0; let l=height(node.left); let r=height(node.right); diam=Math.max(diam,l+r); return 1+Math.max(l,r);} height(root); return diam;}
templates.cpp: int solve(TreeNode* root){int diam=0; function<int(TreeNode*)> height=[&](TreeNode* node){if(!node)return 0; int l=height(node->left); int r=height(node->right); diam=max(diam,l+r); return 1+max(l,r);}; height(root); return diam;}

title: Range Sum of BST
description: Sum of values in range [low,high].

templates.python: def solve(root,low,high): if not root: return 0; if root.val<low: return solve(root.right,low,high); if root.val>high: return solve(root.left,low,high); return root.val+solve(root.left,low,high)+solve(root.right,low,high)
templates.javascript: function solve(root,low,high){if(!root)return 0; if(root.val<low)return solve(root.right,low,high); if(root.val>high)return solve(root.left,low,high); return root.val+solve(root.left,low,high)+solve(root.right,low,high);}
templates.cpp: int solve(TreeNode* root,int low,int high){if(!root)return 0; if(root->val<low)return solve(root->right,low,high); if(root->val>high)return solve(root->left,low,high); return root->val+solve(root->left,low,high)+solve(root->right,low,high);}

title: Top K Frequent Words
description: Return k most frequent words.

templates.python:
from collections import Counter
import heapq
def solve(words,k): count=Counter(words); return [w for w,_ in heapq.nsmallest(k, count.items(), key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0]))]
templates.javascript: function solve(words,k){let map={}; for(let w of words)map[w]=(map[w]||0)+1; return Object.keys(map).sort((a,b)=>map[b]-map[a]||a.localeCompare(b)).slice(0,k);}
templates.cpp: vector<string> solve(vector<string>& words,int k){unordered_map<string,int> cnt; for(string w:words)cnt[w]++; priority_queue<pair<int,string>, vector<pair<int,string>>, greater<pair<int,string>>> pq; for(auto& p:cnt){pq.push({p.second, p.first}); if(pq.size()>k)pq.pop();} vector<string> res; while(!pq.empty()){res.push_back(pq.top().second); pq.pop();} reverse(res.begin(),res.end()); return res;}

title: Replace Words
description: Replace words in sentence with shortest root.

examples.input:
cat bat rat
"the cattle was rattled"

templates.python:
class TrieNode: def __init__(self): self.children={}; self.word=None
def solve(dict, sentence): root=TrieNode(); for w in dict: node=root; for ch in w: if ch not in node.children: node.children[ch]=TrieNode(); node=node.children[ch]; node.word=w; res=[]; for w in sentence.split(): node=root; for ch in w: if ch not in node.children: break; node=node.children[ch]; if node.word: res.append(node.word); break; else: res.append(w); return ' '.join(res)
templates.javascript: function solve(dict, sentence){let root={}; for(let w of dict){let node=root; for(let ch of w){if(!node[ch])node[ch]={}; node=node[ch];} node.word=w;} let res=[]; for(let w of sentence.split(' ')){let node=root; let replacement=w; for(let ch of w){if(!node[ch])break; node=node[ch]; if(node.word){replacement=node.word; break;}} res.push(replacement);} return res.join(' ');}
templates.cpp: string solve(vector<string>& dict, string sentence){struct TrieNode{unordered_map<char,TrieNode*> children; string word;}; TrieNode* root=new TrieNode(); for(string w:dict){TrieNode* node=root; for(char c:w){if(!node->children[c])node->children[c]=new TrieNode(); node=node->children[c];} node->word=w;} string res, word; stringstream ss(sentence); while(ss>>word){TrieNode* node=root; string replacement=word; for(char c:word){if(!node->children.count(c))break; node=node->children[c]; if(!node->word.empty()){replacement=node->word; break;}} res+=replacement+' ';} if(!res.empty())res.pop_back(); return res;}

title: Bipartite Graph
description: Check if graph is bipartite.

templates.python: def solve(graph): color={}; for node in range(len(graph)): if node not in color: stack=[node]; color[node]=0; while stack: u=stack.pop(); for v in graph[u]: if v not in color: color[v]=color[u]^1; stack.append(v); elif color[v]==color[u]: return False; return True
templates.javascript: function solve(graph){let color={}; for(let i=0;i<graph.length;i++){if(color[i]===undefined){let stack=[i]; color[i]=0; while(stack.length){let u=stack.pop(); for(let v of graph[u]){if(color[v]===undefined){color[v]=color[u]^1; stack.push(v);} else if(color[v]===color[u])return false;}}}} return true;}
templates.cpp: bool solve(vector<vector<int>>& graph){unordered_map<int,int> color; for(int i=0;i<graph.size();i++){if(!color.count(i)){stack<int> st; st.push(i); color[i]=0; while(!st.empty()){int u=st.top(); st.pop(); for(int v:graph[u]){if(!color.count(v)){color[v]=color[u]^1; st.push(v);} else if(color[v]==color[u])return false;}}}} return true;}

title: Word Break II
description: Return all sentences from word break.

examples.input:
catsanddog
cat cats and sand dog

templates.python: def solve(s, wordDict): wordSet=set(wordDict); from functools import lru_cache; @lru_cache(None) def dp(i): if i==len(s): return ['']; res=[]; for j in range(i+1,len(s)+1): if s[i:j] in wordSet: sub=dp(j); for w in sub: res.append(s[i:j]+('' if w=='' else ' '+w)); return res; return dp(0)
templates.javascript: function solve(s, wordDict){let wordSet=new Set(wordDict); let memo={}; function dp(i){if(i===s.length)return ['']; if(memo[i])return memo[i]; let res=[]; for(let j=i+1;j<=s.length;j++){let w=s.slice(i,j); if(wordSet.has(w)){let sub=dp(j); for(let t of sub)res.push(w+(t?(' '+t):''));}} memo[i]=res; return res;} return dp(0);}
templates.cpp: vector<string> solve(string s, vector<string>& wordDict){unordered_set<string> dict(wordDict.begin(), wordDict.end()); unordered_map<int, vector<string>> memo; function<vector<string>(int)> dfs=[&](int i){if(i==s.size())return vector<string>{""}; if(memo.count(i))return memo[i]; vector<string> res; for(int j=i+1;j<=s.size();j++){string w=s.substr(i,j-i); if(dict.count(w)){auto sub=dfs(j); for(string t:sub)res.push_back(w+(t.empty()?"":" "+t));}} memo[i]=res; return res;}; return dfs(0);}

title: Sliding Window Maximum (Monotonic Queue)
description: Sliding window max using deque.

templates.python:
from collections import deque
def solve(arr,k): dq=deque(); res=[]; for i,x in enumerate(arr): if dq and dq[0]<=i-k: dq.popleft(); while dq and arr[dq[-1]]<=x: dq.pop(); dq.append(i); if i>=k-1: res.append(arr[dq[0]]); return res
templates.javascript: function solve(arr,k){let dq=[], res=[]; for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++){if(dq.length && dq[0]<=i-k)dq.shift(); while(dq.length && arr[dq[dq.length-1]]<=arr[i])dq.pop(); dq.push(i); if(i>=k-1)res.push(arr[dq[0]]);} return res;}
templates.cpp: vector<int> solve(vector<int>& arr,int k){deque<int> dq; vector<int> res; for(int i=0;i<arr.size();i++){if(!dq.empty()&&dq.front()<=i-k)dq.pop_front(); while(!dq.empty()&&arr[dq.back()]<=arr[i])dq.pop_back(); dq.push_back(i); if(i>=k-1)res.push_back(arr[dq.front()]);} return res;}
